hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; bun run plugins/notify/detect-events.ts 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || (git add -A && git commit -m "chore: auto-commit session changes") || true'
